title: ICJ Orders Israel to Ensure Basic Needs for Gaza Population
detail: The International Court of Justice ruled that Israel must ensure basic needs of Gaza's population are met and must support UN relief efforts including UNRWA. The ruling came amid Israel's suspension of aid deliveries and humanitarian organizations from operating in Gaza.

title: IDF Closes Hostages and Missing Persons Headquarters
detail: The Israel Defense Forces formally shuttered its Hostages and Missing Persons Headquarters, 846 days after the October 7 Hamas attack. All 251 hostages taken that day have been accounted for, with the last hostage Ran Gvili recovered deceased on January 26, 2026.
